title: 2 Pixels fire
description: Makes the fire 2 pixels, "blurred", and removes the animation. Also removes fire from the screen. No smoke.
body:
![banner 2pxls fire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/735d0f2bf0ee4cb8be35bbdc0cb18fe0ae48099f.png)

[![discord-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-singular_vector.svg)](https://dsc.gg/spectrr3)
[![modrinth-gallery](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/modrinth-gallery_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/2-pixels-fire/gallery)  
A 2 pixel fire that was taken from the [iwtdie](https://t.me/iwtdietg) pack and laid out as a separate pack.
- Fire 2 pixels
- "Blurred" fire
- Removes the animation
- Removes fire from the screen
- No smoke  
### Why 2 Pixels fire?
I found this type of fire very beautiful and aesthetically pleasing, and I also saw many people who walk with the same fire, so I posted it as a separate package.
### Information:
Pack version 1.15-26.1 Snaphsot 1 (but in version lower 1.20 resource pack it will be displayed as "Made for an oder version of Minecraft", I am aware of this, but I can't do anything.)  
You can combine this pack with my [PvP Basics](https://modrinth.com/project/ehZrmfH1) pack if you don't want to see fire on the screen.
